name: Socket Wrench Set
description: Essential set of sockets and wrenches for removing and tightening nuts and bolts. Includes metric and imperial sizes.
usage: Used for fastening and loosening bolts in engine repair and general maintenance.
safety: Ensure sockets are properly seated to avoid rounding bolts.

name: OBD-II Diagnostic Scanner
description: Professional diagnostic tool that reads and clears trouble codes from vehicle computer systems. Displays live data streams.
usage: Plug into OBD-II port under dashboard to retrieve error codes and monitor engine parameters.
safety: Always ensure engine is off when connecting the scanner.

name: Hydraulic Floor Jack
description: Heavy-duty hydraulic jack capable of lifting vehicles up to 3 tons. Provides stable lifting for maintenance work.
usage: Position under vehicle frame and pump handle to lift for tire changes or undercarriage access.
safety: Always use jack stands after lifting. Never work under a vehicle supported only by a jack.

name: Torque Wrench
description: Precision tool for applying specific torque to fasteners. Prevents over-tightening or under-tightening critical bolts.
usage: Set desired torque value and tighten bolts until the wrench clicks. Essential for cylinder head and wheel bolts.
safety: Release tension after each use to maintain calibration accuracy.

name: Multimeter
description: Digital multimeter for measuring voltage, resistance, and continuity in automotive electrical systems.
usage: Test battery voltage, check sensor resistance, and diagnose electrical faults.
safety: Never measure resistance on live circuits to protect the meter.

name: Engine Hoist
description: Hydraulic engine hoist for safely removing and installing engines. Capacity up to 2 tons.
usage: Attach lifting chains to engine mounting points and pump to raise or lower.
safety: Ensure all chains are secure before lifting. Never exceed rated capacity.

name: Screwdriver Set
description: Complete set of flat-head and Phillips screwdrivers in various sizes for general workshop use.
usage: Used for removing and installing screws on interior panels, trim, and small components.
safety: Choose the correct tip size to avoid stripping screw heads.

name: Compression Tester
description: Tool for measuring engine cylinder compression to diagnose internal engine issues.
usage: Thread into spark plug hole and crank engine to measure compression in each cylinder.
safety: Disable fuel and ignition systems before testing to prevent accidental starting.

name: Vehicle Ramps
description: Steel ramps for driving vehicles onto for elevated access. Suitable for oil changes and inspections.
usage: Position ramps in front of tires and drive vehicle slowly onto them.
safety: Chock rear wheels and engage parking brake before working under vehicle.

name: Pliers Set
description: Assorted pliers including needle-nose, slip-joint, and locking pliers for gripping and bending.
usage: Used for holding components, bending metal, and securing fasteners.
safety: Use the right plier type for the job to prevent slipping.

name: Smoke Machine
description: Diagnostic tool that generates smoke vapor to detect vacuum and exhaust leaks in engine systems.
usage: Connect to intake or exhaust system and watch for smoke escaping from leaks.
safety: Allow engine to cool before connecting smoke machine.

name: Transmission Jack
description: Specialized jack designed for safely removing and installing transmissions.
usage: Position under transmission, strap securely, and adjust height for alignment.
safety: Always use safety straps to prevent transmission from falling.

name: Impact Wrench
description: High-torque pneumatic or electric tool for quick removal of wheel nuts and stubborn bolts.
usage: Apply to fastener and allow torque to loosen or tighten quickly.
safety: Use impact-rated sockets only to prevent shattering.

name: Timing Light
description: Inductive timing light for checking and adjusting ignition timing on older vehicles.
usage: Connect to battery and spark plug wire, shine at timing marks while engine runs.
safety: Keep hands away from moving belts and fans while testing.

name: Jack Stands
description: Pair of adjustable jack stands for safely supporting vehicles during maintenance.
usage: Place under vehicle frame after lifting with a jack, adjust height for secure support.
safety: Always use jack stands as secondary support. Never work under vehicle without them.

name: Brake Bleeder Kit
description: One-man brake bleeding system for removing air from hydraulic brake lines.
usage: Attach to bleeder screw, open valve, and pump brake pedal to expel old fluid.
safety: Use proper brake fluid type for your vehicle. Dispose of old fluid responsibly.

name: Spark Plug Tester
description: Quick diagnostic tool to verify spark plug ignition and spark strength.
usage: Connect between spark plug wire and plug, crank engine to check spark.
safety: Disconnect fuel pump to prevent flooding during testing.
